final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand-ready logo for a cultural-experiential Israeli project.

Style/medium:
  Custom logo wordmark design
  Modern, bold, playful but controlled
  Innovative and highly memorable
  Friendly and approachable — not childish, not generic

Composition:
  Based on the attached logo as the exact structural base
  Two tilted capsule/ticket shapes retained
  Playful dynamic composition preserved
  Overall friendly and experiential feeling maintained

Subject:
  Logo with custom Hebrew wordmark "קפסולת הזמן"
  The lettering must feel specially designed for this project — not a generic rounded Hebrew font
  Give distinctive personality to letters: ק, פ, ס, ת, ז, מ, ן
  Rounded, bold, brand-specific custom letterforms

Scene/backdrop:

Lighting/mood:

Color palette:
  Retain the main color idea from the original logo

Materials/textures:

Text (verbatim): קפסולת הזמן

Constraints:
  Use the uploaded logo as the exact base — same overall concept, same two tilted capsule/ticket shapes
  Typography must feel iconic and branded, not generic
  Lettering should feel custom-designed for this specific project

Avoid:
  Childish cartoon style
  Generic bubble font
  Handwritten look
  Ornamental tricks or overly decorative details
  Replacing or removing the capsule/ticket shapes
